name: gopher-code
description: Claude Code, rewritten from scratch in Go. Zero Node.js. Zero Electron. One binary.
readme_summary: Gopher Code is a complete rewrite of the Claude Code application from scratch in Go. It aims to provide a single, static binary with no Node.js or Electron dependencies, offering significantly faster startup times, reduced memory usage, and easier cross-compilation.
primary_use_case: To provide a highly performant, dependency-free, and easily distributable version of the Claude Code application, optimized for speed and resource efficiency.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled Go programmer, depicted as a master craftsman, meticulously assembling a sleek, single, polished metal sphere (representing the Go binary) from scattered, complex, and tangled wires (representing the original Node.js/Electron codebase). The craftsman is working in a clean, minimalist workshop bathed in bright, efficient light. Small, glowing digital particles representing speed and efficiency emanate from the sphere. Subtle UI elements showing simplified code snippets and tool icons are visible on a nearby workbench. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a vibrant color palette, emphasizing clarity and transformation.

name: voicebox
readme_summary: Voicebox is an open-source, local-first voice synthesis studio that allows users to clone voices, generate speech in multiple languages and TTS engines, apply audio effects, and compose multi-voice projects. It prioritizes user privacy by running entirely on the user's machine and offers a REST API for integration into other applications.
key_features: 5 TTS engines (Qwen3-TTS, LuxTTS, Chatterbox Multilingual, Chatterbox Turbo, HumeAI TADA)
Post-processing audio effects (pitch shift, reverb, delay, chorus, compression, filters)
Unlimited speech length with auto-chunking and crossfade
Multi-track timeline editor for composing voice projects
API-first design with a REST API
Cross-platform compatibility (macOS, Windows, Linux, Docker) with support for various hardware accelerators (MLX, CUDA, ROCm, Intel Arc)
primary_use_case: To provide users with a private, powerful, and versatile local application for voice cloning, speech generation, and audio editing, enabling the creation of voice-powered applications and content.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled sound engineer, depicted as a modern alchemist, stands in a cozy, tech-infused studio. They hold a small vial containing a shimmering, captured voice sample (input). Before them, a magical soundboard glows, transforming the vial's essence into a flowing river of diverse audio waves (output) that form into distinct speech bubbles in various languages. Subtle UI elements of Voicebox are visible on a nearby screen, showing voice cloning and timeline editing. The scene is bathed in warm, ambient light, emphasizing the local, private nature of the process. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a vibrant, yet harmonious color palette, clearly symbolizing the transformation of raw audio into polished speech.

name: Infographic
description: 🦋 An Infographic Generation and Rendering Framework, bring words to life with AI!
readme_summary: AntV Infographic is a declarative infographic visualization engine that uses a specialized syntax to quickly and flexibly render high-quality infographics. It aims to make information presentation more efficient and data storytelling simpler, with AI-friendly features for generation and editing.
key_features: AI-friendly configuration and syntax for AI generation, streaming output, and rendering
Approximately 200 built-in infographic templates, data-item components, and layouts
Theme system with preset themes and deep customization options
High-quality SVG output for visual fidelity and easy editing
primary_use_case: Generating and rendering high-quality infographics declaratively, with AI assistance for creation and editing.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly AI robot assistant holding a magic wand, standing in front of a blank digital canvas. The robot is conjuring vibrant, animated infographics from simple text prompts and data streams that flow from a tablet it holds. The infographics take the form of clear charts, timelines, and diagrams, illustrating concepts like 'Step 1', 'Step 2', 'Step 3'. Subtle code snippets and data points float around the robot. The scene is set in a clean, modern studio with soft, inspiring lighting. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a bright, approachable color palette, emphasizing clarity and ease of use.

name: savr
description: Read it later. Keep it local. No server needed.
readme_summary: Savr is a progressive web app designed for saving online content like articles and images for offline reading. It prioritizes user data ownership, decentralization, and works locally without requiring a server or company dependency.
key_features: Read content and images without an internet connection
No dependency on a service/company for scraping or storage
Optional authorization and cross-device synchronization (Dropbox/Google Drive)
Supports additional document types (md, txt, pdf, images)
primary_use_case: Saving and reading online content offline, with a focus on user data control and decentralization.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian in a cozy, dimly lit study, carefully placing digital articles from a flowing stream of web pages into a personal, ancient-looking tome. Each article is represented by a glowing icon. The stream of web pages is visibly being filtered, with distracting elements like 'ads' represented as shadowy figures being pushed away. The tome is open, showing clean text and images, and a small, subtle 'Savr' logo is embossed on its cover. The scene uses a warm, inviting color palette and is rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style, emphasizing the personal and organized nature of saving content for later.

name: Mantella
description: Mantella is a Skyrim and Fallout 4 mod which allows you to naturally speak to NPCs using a Speech-to-Text → LLMs → Text-to-Speech pipeline
readme_summary: Mantella is a mod for Skyrim and Fallout 4 that integrates AI-powered voice interaction with NPCs. It uses a pipeline of speech-to-text, large language models (LLMs), and text-to-speech to enable players to speak naturally with game characters.
key_features: LLM integration for natural language processing
Enables natural voice interaction with NPCs
primary_use_case: To allow players of Skyrim and Fallout 4 to interact with Non-Player Characters (NPCs) using their own voice, creating a more immersive and natural gameplay experience.
cover_image_prompt: A medieval bard in a bustling Skyrim tavern, holding a magical lute that glows with digital energy. As the bard sings into a stylized microphone, the sound waves transform into speech bubbles containing complex AI-generated dialogue. These speech bubbles then flow towards a group of diverse Skyrim NPCs, who react with animated expressions. Subtle lines of code and data streams emanate from the microphone and the NPCs, visually connecting the voice input to the AI's response. The scene is rendered in a vibrant, fantasy digital painting style with a focus on character interaction and magical technology, emphasizing the seamless blend of voice and AI in the game world.

name: BubbleLab
description: Open-core workflow engine powering Bubble Lab — and fully runnable, hostable, and extensible on its own.
readme_summary: Bubble Lab is an open-core workflow engine that powers its own AI operator platform. It allows teams to automate operational tasks directly within Slack using an AI assistant named Pearl, and can be run, hosted, and extended independently for custom automation needs.
primary_use_case: To provide a self-hostable and extensible workflow engine for automating operational tasks, building custom agents, and integrating with various systems.
cover_image_prompt: A master craftsman in a bustling workshop, assembling intricate clockwork mechanisms that represent automated workflows. Gears and cogs of various sizes are being connected by glowing digital threads, symbolizing data flow and integrations. One central mechanism, labeled 'Bubble Lab Engine,' is powering smaller, specialized tools and robotic arms that perform distinct tasks. In the background, a subtle Slack-like interface shows tasks being completed. The scene is brightly lit with a clean, modern aesthetic, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clarity and interconnectedness.
